title: Global Storytelling and Creativity Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A strong effort to achieve something important, often related to a cause or belief.
choices: crusade
assail
stamina
rounds.answer: crusade
rounds.explanation: crusade: A strong effort to achieve something important, often related to a cause or belief.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Very eager or enthusiastic about something.
choices: crusade
assail
avid
rounds.answer: avid
rounds.explanation: avid: Very eager or enthusiastic about something.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Funny or silly actions or behaviours that people do.
choices: assail
antics
crusade
rounds.answer: antics
rounds.explanation: antics: Funny or silly actions or behaviours that people do.

games.title: Spelling Builder
games.description: Choose letter tiles to build important unit words.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: To make something clear or easier to understand.
rounds.answer: clarify

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: Taking unnecessary risks without thinking about consequences.
rounds.answer: foolhardy

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: A lot of noise and activity, usually caused by excitement or upset.
rounds.answer: commotion

games.title: Sentence Puzzle
games.description: Put unit words into the correct sentence order.

rounds.answer: Can you clarify what you mean by that?
Running every day helped her build her stamina for the marathon.
She is an avid reader who finishes a book every week.

games.title: Speaking Quest
games.description: Listen, record, review and submit useful unit language.

rounds.target: After reading The Edge of the Infinite, practise retelling the story in your own words.
Think about a cause or topic that matters to you.
Explain one important unit idea, give a reason with because, and respond to two follow-up questions.

games.title: Word Order Race
games.description: Arrange unit language in a clear, accurate order.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: We enjoyed a balmy evening at the beach.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: After her illness, she needed a few weeks to recuperate.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: My friends showed their support by coming to my soccer game.

games.title: Definition Dash
games.description: Choose the approved meaning before moving to the next clue.

rounds.prompt: What does 'jut' mean in this unit?
choices: To stick out or extend beyond something else.
A strong effort to achieve something important, often related to a cause or belief.
To attack someone or something violently or with strong words.
rounds.answer: To stick out or extend beyond something else.
rounds.explanation: jut: To stick out or extend beyond something else.
